project_type: Harbor Terminal-Bench debugging task - Time-Series Compaction Engine
test_framework: pytest via uv, bash test.sh orchestrator
build_command: docker build is not available - use python3 -m runtime.run_compactor directly
verification_instructions: 1. Run python3 -m runtime.run_compactor from /app equivalent (environment/runtime parent). 2. Verify output files exist. 3. Run tests. NOP (buggy) should give 4 pass / 6 fail. Oracle (repaired) should give 10 pass.
setup_instructions: No external dependencies needed - stdlib only Python 3.11
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Validate by running Python directly. All tests must work with python3 and pytest (installed via uv in Docker, but we can test locally with pytest).
contribution_requirements: This is a greenfield task creation. Must produce: task.toml, instruction.md, environment/ (Dockerfile + runtime code), tests/ (test.sh + test_compactor.py), solution/ (solve.sh + repair script). No BUG/FIXME/TODO/HACK comments in source code.
key_patterns: 5 interacting bugs embedded in working code. TSV input format. JSON output format. Config INI file with multiple sections. Module-level caching pattern. Multi-tier retention processing.
directory_structure: environment/ contains Dockerfile and runtime/ with all source code. runtime/ has config/, data/, output/ subdirs plus Python modules. tests/ has test.sh and pytest file. solution/ has solve.sh and repair script.
